subtitle.ja: 両手の人差し指と親指に糸をかけて始めます。両手親指で人差し指の糸を上から取り、指に巻き付けながら手を上に向けます
subtitle.en: Begin with strings on both index fingers and thumbs. With both thumbs, move over and pick down the index-finger strings, turning the hands upward as the strings wrap onto the thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 両手の親指で、人差し指の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pick up the index-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 両手の人差し指で、親指の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both index fingers, pick up the thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指で、反対の手のひらの糸を取り合います
subtitle.en: With both index fingers, pick up the palm strings of the opposite hands.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の上の1本の糸を残したまま、下の2本の糸だけを外します
subtitle.en: Keeping the upper string on each index finger, release only the two lower strings.

subtitle.ja: 両手人差し指で、親指向こうの糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: With both index fingers, pick up from below the far thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 左手から全ての糸を静かに外し、右手親指の輪に左手親指を、右手人差し指の輪に左手人差し指を下から入れます
subtitle.en: Gently release all the strings from the left hand; insert the left thumb up into the right thumb loop, and the left index finger up into the right index-finger loop.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の上の糸を残したまま、下の糸だけを外します
subtitle.en: Keeping the upper strings on both index fingers, release only the lower strings.

subtitle.ja: 中央の菱形の輪に両手小指を下から入れ、人差し指向こう側の糸を2本とも取ります
subtitle.en: Insert both little fingers up into the central diamond, and pick up from below both far index-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 親指の糸を外し、手を左右に軽く広げて完成です
subtitle.en: Release the thumb strings, spread the hands slightly to show the finished figure.

subtitle.ja: 両手をゆっくり左右に広げることで、月が小さくなりながら上がっていきます
subtitle.en: As you slowly draw the hands apart, the moon rises and grows smaller.
